profile.name: Mrunal Patil
profile.title: Senior QA Engineer | SDET | AI Testing Specialist
profile.summary: Senior QA Engineer and SDET with 4.7 years of experience across SaaS, WordPress, AI-assisted, and government-grade web/mobile products. Strong in Playwright E2E automation, API validation, OWASP-aligned security testing, release sign-off, and AI-assisted QA workflows.

experience.scope: WordPress & SaaS products: Astra, Starter Templates, Spectra, CartFlows, ZipWP, SureTriggers, SureForms, SureRank, SureMail, SureWriter.
highlights: Built Playwright E2E automation for 200+ SaaS regression cases, reducing regression from 3 days to under 8 hours.
Owned QA strategy, release validation, and sign-off support for ZipWP, SureTriggers, and SureForms product workflows.
Integrated GitHub Actions quality gates and used AI-assisted test generation to speed up test design and defect triage.
Performed manual, regression, API, exploratory, and cross-browser testing across fast-moving SaaS releases.
awards: Bug Detective of the Year - ZipWP 2024

experience.scope: Government digital platforms: DigiLocker, UMANG, SancharSaathi, API Setu, MeriPehchaan, OpenForge, Poshan Tracker.
highlights: Executed OWASP Top 10-aligned testing across 7 platforms, identifying SQLi, XSS, IDOR, authentication, and API security risks.
Performed web, Android, API, manual, exploratory, and UI testing for public digital infrastructure workflows.
Logged and tracked 80+ defects in Jira, validated security patches, and performed post-fix regression checks.
Developed and tested responsive HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress pages.
Performed UI, usability, and cross-browser testing; reported UI/UX defects before release.

projects.name: SureForms Plugin QA Suite
projects.description: Designed 181 manual cases and added Playwright POM automation with Docker execution, smoke checks, generated-form E2E flows, fixtures, and QA status reports.

projects.name: AI Application QA Suite
projects.description: Documented ChatGPT web/mobile QA with 32 cases, 11 defects, AI response usability checks, file upload/state testing, exploratory charters, RTM, and security observations.

projects.name: WooCommerce E-Commerce QA Suite
projects.description: Executed full manual QA cycle with 35 test cases, 12 bugs, RTM, exploratory charters, responsive/mobile coverage, and checkout/cart defect reports.

projects.name: WordPress Astra QA Suite
projects.description: Tested Astra Theme and Starter Templates across 30 cases and 10 defects covering data integrity, responsive UI, builder flows, imports, and regression risk.

projects.name: SaaS E2E Automation Framework
projects.description: Built reusable Playwright POM coverage for login, forms, API mocking, cross-browser regression, parallel CI, flaky-test visibility, and failure reporting.

projects.name: OWASP Security Checklist
projects.description: Created OWASP Top 10 checklist using Burp Suite and Postman with reproduction steps, evidence, impact, and remediation guidance.

education: MCA - Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering, Pune, 2021-2022
B.Sc Computer Science - Moolji Jaitha College, Jalgaon, 2017-2020

quickAnswers.manual: Yes. Mrunal has strong manual QA experience across SaaS, WordPress, government web apps, Android workflows, regression, UI, exploratory, cross-browser, and defect lifecycle testing.
quickAnswers.automation: She built Playwright E2E automation for 200+ SaaS regression cases, used POM architecture, GitHub Actions quality gates, API mocking, Docker execution, and reporting.
quickAnswers.lead: Yes. She owned QA strategy, test planning, release validation, and sign-off support for ZipWP, SureTriggers, and SureForms. She also collaborated with product and engineering in Agile ceremonies.
quickAnswers.security: She executed OWASP Top 10-aligned testing across 7 government platforms, finding SQLi, XSS, IDOR, authentication, and API security risks, then validated fixes and regression cycles.
